# IOUSBHIDReportDesc

**Structure**

## Declaration

```swift
typedef struct IOUSBHIDReportDesc {
    ...
} IOUSBHIDReportDesc;
```

## Overview

USB HID Report Descriptor header. See the USB HID Specification at [link-1670329]. (This structure should have used the #pragma pack(1) compiler directive to get byte alignment.

## Instance Properties

- **hidDescriptorLengthHi**
- **hidDescriptorLengthLo**
- **hidDescriptorType**
